title: Qoryooley Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Qoryooley with a Z-Score of +3.03. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Qoryooley is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 9.6 GG. 
 The high humidity of 81% and moderate wind speed of 10.9 km/h are exacerbating the situation. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, while the cooling degree days are significantly high.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
